 --MP_/FmbMNy+rRDcyoPqjG/H=iwj
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=US-ASCII
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 Content-Disposition: inline
 
 On Wed, 3 Aug 2011 10:02:52 +0200
 Frederic Culot <culot@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
 
 > Hi,
 >=20
 > > Please mention about existing PR for this port:
 > > http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/158454
 >=20
 > I just took the PR, sorry I missed it in the first place.
 >=20
 > Aldis, now that your are the maintainer of this port, do you approve
 > the patch?
 >=20
 > Thanks,
 > culot@
 
 Patch failed to apply cleanly.
 Other than that it looks fine.
 
 I've reformated and attached patch.
 
 --=20
 Aldis Berjoza
   http://www.bsdroot.lv/
 
 --MP_/FmbMNy+rRDcyoPqjG/H=iwj
 Content-Type: text/x-patch
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=avra.patch
 
 diff -Nur avra.bak/Makefile avra/Makefile
 --- avra.bak/Makefile	2011-08-02 20:06:26.000000000 +0300
 +++ avra/Makefile	2011-08-03 14:18:44.955050021 +0300
 @@ -6,29 +6,36 @@
  #
 =20
  PORTNAME=3D	avra
 -PORTVERSION=3D	1.2.1
 -DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=3D	-src
 -PORTREVISION=3D	1
 +PORTVERSION=3D	1.3.0
  CATEGORIES=3D	devel
  MASTER_SITES=3D	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 =20
  MAINTAINER=3D	aldis@bsdroot.lv
  COMMENT=3D	Macro Assembler for Atmel AVR microcontrollers
 =20
 -WRKSRC=3D		${WRKDIR}
 -USE_AUTOTOOLS=3D	aclocal autoconf automake
 -AUTOMAKE_ARGS=3D	-a
 +LICENSE=3D	GPLv2 GPLv3
 +LICENSE_COMB=3D	dual
 =20
 -PORTDOCS=3D	README
 +WRKSRC=3D		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}/src
 =20
 -# Install the Avra README file as docs
 +USE_BZIP2=3D	yes
 +USE_GMAKE=3D	yes
 +MAKEFILE=3D	${WRKSRC}/makefiles/Makefile.linux
 +MAKE_ARGS=3D	CC=3D"${CC}" LD=3D"${CC}" CFLAGS=3D"${CFLAGS}" LDFLAGS=3D""
 +
 +PORTDOCS=3D	*
 +PORTEXAMPLES=3D	*
 +PLIST_FILES=3D	bin/avra
 =20
 -post-install:
 +do-install:
 +	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/avra ${PREFIX}/bin
  .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
  	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 -.for i in ${PORTDOCS}
 -	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${DOCSDIR}
 -.endfor
 +	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/../doc && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${DOCSDIR})
 +.endif
 +.if !defined(NOPORTEXAMPLES)
 +	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 +	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/../examples && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${EXAMPLESDIR})
  .endif
 =20
  .include <bsd.port.mk>
 diff -Nur avra.bak/distinfo avra/distinfo
 --- avra.bak/distinfo	2011-07-03 17:55:14.000000000 +0300
 +++ avra/distinfo	2011-08-03 14:05:29.207070124 +0300
 @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 -SHA256 (avra-1.2.1-src.tar.gz) =3D fe22468ec74ffbd97dcac4de8ba7291dcebd0fc=
 ca72baf085746e1930de5c09f
 -SIZE (avra-1.2.1-src.tar.gz) =3D 108243
 +SHA256 (avra-1.3.0.tar.bz2) =3D a62cbf8662caf9cc4e75da6c634efce40277863920=
 2a65eb2d149002c1049712
 +SIZE (avra-1.3.0.tar.bz2) =3D 314903
 diff -Nur avra.bak/pkg-plist avra/pkg-plist
 --- avra.bak/pkg-plist	2009-12-11 06:18:57.000000000 +0200
 +++ avra/pkg-plist	1970-01-01 03:00:00.000000000 +0300
 @@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
 -bin/avra
 -share/nls/POSIX
 -share/nls/en_US.US-ASCII
 
 --MP_/FmbMNy+rRDcyoPqjG/H=iwj--
